title: Khejroli Heat Wave
lead: Khejroli is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +5.06. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Khejroli is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 16.7 GG. 
 The relative humidity is relatively low at 19%, and the wind speed is moderate at 16.4 km/h. 
 The Heating Degree Day (HDD) value is 0.0 GG, indicating no need for heating, and the focus is on cooling and mitigation strategies.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately to protect the population and infrastructure.
